steps: File NTA Form 11 (Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax) with MUFG Custody to claim JPY 119,850 overpayment on Nintendo dividend
Submit JP-NO tax treaty documentation showing 10% rate applies versus the 15% rate apparently withheld
Request MUFG provide detailed calculation breakdown to confirm 15% withholding was applied instead of treaty rate
Follow up with NTA directly if custodian refund process exceeds standard timeframes

references.title: NTA – Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax (Form 11)
NTA – Application Forms for Income Tax Convention (Form 1 for dividends)
